name: Orzo Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup whole-wheat orzo (or cous-cous, or any other small pasta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a two-quart saucepan.
2. Add Italian seasoning and marjoram.
3. Stir in chopped onion (or leek) and tomato sauce.
4. Return water to a boil, then add the pasta.
5. Reduce heat to maintain a covered simmer and cook until pasta is tender and water is absorbed.
6. Stir in frozen peas and let them heat through.
7. Serve.
